AI-powered precision agriculture

Livestock intelligence, field maps, and weather risk in one platform.

AgroNexis helps modern farms monitor herd health, map grazing pressure, forecast weather risk, and coordinate multilingual field teams from one AI command center.

Platform

A responsive operating system for livestock and field decisions.

Replace scattered reports with one multilingual workspace for farm managers, veterinarians, agronomists, and operators.

AI layer active

Crop intelligence

Detect canopy stress, irrigation gaps, and growth changes before they become expensive field issues.

AI layer active

Livestock monitoring

Track herd movement, heat exposure, feed efficiency, and pasture pressure from one operational view.

AI layer active

Weather-led planning

Prioritize spraying, grazing, irrigation, and harvest windows with live risk scoring.

Livestock monitoring

See animal health, movement, and heat stress before losses compound.

Track herd behavior, paddock pressure, feed efficiency, and welfare signals with AI summaries your team can act on quickly.

Live camera scan

Turn the field in front of you into instant guidance.

Scan livestock, pasture, or crop rows. The interface surfaces stress signals, water pressure, and priority actions.
